The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic

summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
STAR ATLAS #229 RARE CREW MEMBER CARD FOR 1000 PLAYERS!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about updates in Star Atlas.
Metaverse Nomads #142 Titan Ship Owner Extravaganza
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Star Atlas Eveeye STARBASED updates
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about updates in EveEye for SAGE Starbased.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #125
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas Fimbul BYOS Ranger VS Vsus Opod
Beyond the Horizon posted a video talking about the new Fimbul BYOS Ranger Star Atlas ship.
The Atlas Brew #107
Star Atlas TV posted a recorded video of the latest Atlas Brew.
Atlas Brew #107: SURGE – TLDR
Beth posted a video recapping the latest Atlas Brew.
